strengths: Strong multi-disciplinary backend experience with distributed systems (Node.js, Dlang, Java, C++) and real-time data handling
Direct exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agent frameworks) at re:cinq
Proven track record in building and scaling event-driven systems (GISCollective, Dunnhumby) and optimizing performance-critical applications
concerns: Limited explicit fintech or credit-risk domain experience in resume or prior roles
No direct evidence of leading teams to 30+ engineers or scaling organizations beyond smaller teams (max ~10 reported)
No clear experience with regulated environments or auditable AI systems in commercial contexts
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical depth in distributed systems, real-time data processing, and emerging agentic AI tooling, which aligns well with the architecture requirements. However, he lacks direct fintech or credit-risk domain experience and has not led large-scale engineering teams (30+ engineers) or operated in highly regulated environments, which are core requirements for this role. His background in event-driven systems and performance optimization is valuable, but the gaps in regulatory compliance and fintech infrastructure weigh heavily against his suitability.
